title: meibomia neglecta
intro: Meibomia neglecta, also known as Butterfly Weed, is a flowering plant species native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects due to its high concentration of flavonoids and iridoid glycosides. The health benefits associated with Meibomia neglecta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
